---
name: Benchmark request
about: Propose a new benchmark task or evaluator
title: "[Benchmark] "
labels: benchmark
---

## Task Scope

Describe the design task and intended power electronics domain.

## Required Inputs

List required task fields, units, and constraints.

## Expected Agent Output

Describe the machine-readable output schema.

## Evaluation Logic

Describe deterministic checks, simulator calls, and scoring.

## Evidence Gates

List required simulation, thermal, safety, BOM, or human-review evidence.
